title: Sanji and Zoro Reach Their Limits
description: On pages 4–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Sanji, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Queen as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He can shoot beams from his eyes?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I wanted to show you them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...After you used your suit to Morph!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Judge's sons are the culmination of his scientific work!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was hoping to crush you while you had that suit on.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that would've shown that bastard once and for all...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that his tech can't hold a candle to mine!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your feud has nothing to do with me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've dug up everything there is to know...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My Arsenal can replicate anything you brothers can do!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't ever mention them in front of me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You think you can control what I say?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 44 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
